data.title: The Daily: JPMorgan says Tether may sell bitcoin under new US stablecoin rules, Paolo Ardoino calls analysts ‘salty’ and more
data.description:
The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/340780/the-daily-jpmorgan-says-tether-may-sell-bitcoin-under-new-us-stablecoin-rules-paolo-ardoino-calls-analysts-salty-and-more?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: NFT market OpenSea teases token launch
data.description:
The token launch is part of a broader revamp of the protocol, which its CEO says became too “corporate.”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/nft-market-open-sea-teases-token-launch?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether May Need to Sell Bitcoin to Meet Proposed US Stablecoin Rules, Says JP Morgan
data.description:
JP Morgan claims that stablecoin leader Tether may need to sell its Bitcoin reserves to meet proposed U.S. rules. Tether says JPM is "salty."
source: https://decrypt.co/305798/tether-sell-bitcoin-meet-proposed-us-rules-jpmorgan

data.title: MatterFi Wallet Technology To Integrate With Trrue Blockchain Ecosystem
data.description:
MatterFi integrates AI-powered wallet infrastructure with Trrue's blockchain ecosystem to enhance security and usability for digital asset transactions.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/02/43707177/matterfi-wallet-technology-to-integrate-with-trrue-blockchain-ecosystem?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: 61 mln Shiba Inu burned in a week – Will this help SHIB reach $0.000020?
data.description:
A successful retest above $0.000017 could propel Shiba Inu by 18% and take it toward the $0.000020 level.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/61-mln-shiba-inu-burned-in-a-week-will-this-help-shib-reach-0-000020/

data.title: Glassnode Co-Founders Issue Bitcoin Alert, Say BTC To Fall if ‘Conditions Don’t Improve’
data.description:
The co-founders of the market intelligence platform Glassnode are warning that Bitcoin (BTC) may decline if two main conditions don’t start improving. In a new thread on the social media platform X, Glassnode and Swissblock co-founders Jan Happel and Yann Alleman – who together share the handle Negentropic – say that Bitcoin is at risk […]
The post Glassnode Co-Founders Issue Bitcoin Alert,...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/13/glassnode-co-founders-issue-bitcoin-alert-say-btc-to-fall-if-conditions-dont-improve/

data.title: Trump Predicts Stability In Global Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced on February 14 that tariffs in many countries are expected to remain unchanged. He advised against anticipating any exemptions or reductions in these tariffs.

data.title: 2 cryptocurrencies to reach a $200 billion market cap in March
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) and the broader cryptocurrency market have been rattled by heightened volatility following hotter-than-expected economic data, reigniting inflation concerns. … Continue reading

source: https://finbold.com/2-cryptocurrencies-to-reach-a-200-billion-market-cap-in-march/

data.title: CZ lets memecoin traders fight it out for Broccoli dominance
data.description:
Changpeng Zhao has unleashed a wave of memecoins inspired by his dog "Broccoli," but stressed he won't be creating his own token.
The post CZ lets memecoin traders fight it out for Broccoli dominance appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/cz-lets-memecoin-traders-fight-it-out-for-broccoli-dominance/

data.title: Dollar Index DXY Experiences Short-Term Increase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 14, the Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a brief surge of nearly 50 points, currently standing at 107.71.
